address.streetAddress: Block A St, Sector 82, IT City, Sector 82A, Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar, Punjab 140308

itemListElement.reviewBody:
It is great to see that parents who use to discuss the excessive Rs.16,000+ fee in WhatsApp groups are now speaking up openly. Let us stand together and voice our concerns, as quality education should not come at an unfair financial burden.
With top schools in Tricity charging half for the same standard of education, this fee is unjustifiable. The high meal charges only add to the strain, making it clear that the focus should shift from profit to providing real value to students.
We sincerely urge the management to reconsider and bring the fees in line with other reputed schools. If they truly care for parents and students, they must take action. Education should be fair, accessible, and not a luxury! It is time to raise our voices and push for a reasonable, justified fee structure.

itemReviewed.name: Manav Rachna International School - Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: The fees are extremely high, exceeding ₹16,000 per month. I will be reaching out to the Education Minister regarding this matter.

itemReviewed.name: Manav Rachna International School - Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am writing to express my concern regarding the current school fee structure, which seems significantly higher compared to other reputed schools in the Tricity area. A fee of ₹16,000+ per month is quite burdensome for many parents, especially when most well-established schools charge between ₹7,000 to ₹9,000 per month.

Additionally, the meal charges of ₹4,000 per month seem excessive, and the uniform fee structure for both junior and senior classes does not take into account the varying needs of different age groups. As parents, we work hard to provide the best education for our children, but such high costs put immense financial pressure on families.

We kindly request the management to review the fee structure and consider a reasonable reduction so that more families can afford quality education without financial strain. We believe that education should be accessible and fairly priced rather than feeling like an undue financial burden.

itemReviewed.name: Manav Rachna International School - Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
We love the way this school is helping us bring up our children. Both my daughters are here and they are growing into lovely ladies. The equal stress that is laid on both academics and extra curricular activities is splendid. The spectrum activity is very very wonderful. Learning made fun in the truest sense. The fact that kids are excited for school everyday in the morning is proof of the fact the school is doing wonders for them.
Thank you for everything.

itemReviewed.name: Manav Rachna International School - Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: The children performed amazingly at the annual Spectrum. One could see the efforts put in by Ms. Charu Class 5 incharge. It’s been the best decision to have my son admitted in this school.

itemReviewed.name: Manav Rachna International School - Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude for the wonderful event you organized at school by grade 2 Everest. The coordination of activities was seamless and well organised. It was great to see how engaged the students were during their performances.
It’s clear that a lot of effort have been done by mentors for making the event a success. It was a well-thought-out program.
My child couldn’t stop talking about how much he enjoyed participating, and it really fostered a sense of community among the students. Thank you to Savina ma’am, Raman ma’am, Shobhita ma’am & all other teachers for your dedication. We’re looking forward to more amazing events in the future!

itemReviewed.name: Manav Rachna International School - Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: It was a delight to watch children perform so wonderfully.Hats off to all the teachers especially Shobita mam for preparing the children so well.We,as adults,learned so much today.I enjoyed a lot,Thank you MRIS for giving parents such a lovely opportunity to watch our children perform .
